task: Region-aware social-button visibility on hosted login page (hide_social / show_social)

logto.status: DONE — built, deployed staging + prod-1, e2e verified both
logto.summary: New URL params hide_social (blacklist) + show_social (whitelist) let a calling App (e.g. cn build) show/hide standard social providers (google/facebook/...) on the Logto hosted login page. Filter applied at single source of truth parseSignInExperienceResponse (sign-in-experience.ts) so the 'or' divider + empty-state branches stay consistent (no orphan divider). Structural guardrail: only socialConnectors array is touched, email/password never hideable. Google hidden => One Tap suppressed. native-caps unit tests 97/97 green.

deploy.staging: id-staging.nicematrix.com — image a09568b35463, container healthy, 7-case real-OIDC e2e PASS
deploy.prod1: id.nicematrix.com (46.224.6.74) — image config 437265c852fc loaded via docker save->scp (md5 4fdbac85e17deb0e0e85f4e692b14996 matched), force-recreate, healthy, 7-case real-OIDC e2e PASS, 0 log errors

logto.caveat: Empty-value params (show_social= / hide_social=) pass through as 'no rule' over OIDC because appendExtraParam skips falsy values (upstream-consistent). Each param must carry >=1 target. Documented in docs/custom-extra-params.md.
logto.client_usage: iOS/Android/Flutter add hide_social / show_social query to the /oidc/auth authorization request (extra params). Native SDK: pass via extraParams.
